title: Inspection
description: A single food-establishment inspection event with its cited violations and resulting score/grade. Reconciles the 'DOHMH New York City Restaurant Inspection Results' Open Data dataset (43nn-pn8j) — which is published one row per violation — into one inspection object per (camis, inspection_date, inspection_type), rolling the violation rows up into a violations array.

camis.description: CAMIS of the inspected establishment (join key to FoodEstablishment).

dba.description: Establishment name at time of inspection.

inspectionType.description: Inspection type/program, e.g. 'Cycle Inspection / Initial Inspection' (Open Data 'inspection_type').

action.description: Action taken as a result of the inspection (Open Data 'action').

score.description: Total violation score — lower is better (Open Data 'score').

grade.description: Letter grade assigned by this inspection, if any (Open Data 'grade').

criticalFlag.description: Whether critical violations were present (Open Data 'critical_flag').

violations.description: The violations cited on this inspection (rolled up from the one-row-per-violation Open Data grain).
